{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = The Seven Principles of Pure Madra
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Seven Principles of Pure Madra]] was written by the [[Script Lord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
